//: PRD-027 AC-6 — the committed recall@5 / MRR baseline the eval gate enforces (baseline − ε, ε = EPSILON in src/eval/golden.ts).
//wave3: MEASURED + STABILIZED 2026-06-21 against live DeepLake (semantic-ON, embed daemon nomic-embed-text-v1.5, honeycomb_ci). The recall-eval was UNSTABLE (recall@5 swung 0.278↔0.556 run-to-run) for TWO compounding reasons, both fixed in tests/integration/recall-eval-live.itest.ts + src/eval/golden.ts: (1) the convergence barrier only polled the scalar content_embedding column, which converges ~15 s AHEAD of the <#> vector segment recall actually queries — so scoring ran on a half-warm index; the barrier now ALSO polls the <#> path (a per-seed cluster-served self-recall, 90% quorum) before scoring. (2) the shared append-only honeycomb_ci workspace accumulates near-duplicate copies of each golden memory across runs (~12 clones of one seed), so which clone <#> ranks first shuffled run-to-run and only the this-run id counted; the eval now scores against the relevance CLASS (any equally-correct copy is a hit). After both fixes, 4 consecutive live runs gave recall@5=0.583 (ALL 4, zero variance), MRR=0.577/0.591/0.591/0.591, recall@10=0.639, nDCG≈0.572–0.581; semantic-vs-lexical recall@5 Δ=0.583 MRR Δ≈0.583 beats=true (4/4). Baseline set AT-OR-BELOW the stable measured value so baseline−ε (ε=0.05) clears the residual ≤0.014 variance with headroom: recall@5 floor 0.50 vs stable 0.583, MRR floor 0.50 vs min-observed 0.577. A real regression below ~0.50/0.50 FAILS the gate; the AC-6 semantic-beats-lexical assertion stays. EPSILON kept at 0.05 (residual variance is far smaller; no widening needed).
//ndcg: PRD-047f f-AC-3 — MEASURED + COMMITTED 2026-06-24 against live DeepLake (semantic-ON, embed daemon nomic-embed-text-v1.5, workspace `honeycomb`, poll-convergent two-phase barrier) on the GRADED golden set (047f f-AC-1). Live graded run measured nDCG@10=0.596 (alongside recall@5=0.639, MRR=0.600, gate passed). Floor set AT-OR-BELOW the measured value mirroring recall@5/MRR conservatism: committed 0.55 → enforced floor 0.50 (baseline−ε, ε=0.05), ~0.096 headroom under the measured 0.596. The nDCG arm of gateAgainstBaseline is now ENFORCED (no longer advisory): a rank-order regression that drops nDCG@10 below 0.50 FAILS the gate. This is the pre-047b/c/d/e reference floor.
